app.name: Fameworld
app.footer: Fameworld — a living world of music and fame. All content is original.

skills.noMasters: No masters to learn from here right now.
skills.masterHint: Learning from a master is faster than studying alone.

auth.toLogin: Already have an account? Log in

create.title: Create your character
create.intro: Choose who you are and where your story begins.
create.noCities: No cities available yet. Seed the world first.

home.hospitalNotice: Your character is recovering in hospital and cannot act until mood and health rise above 15%.

locale.studyHint: Buy a book once, then study it from Attributes & Skills to raise the skill over time.
locale.renting: You are renting an apartment here. Rent is charged weekly.

study.noBooks: No books yet. Buy one at a shop.
study.noSkills: No skills yet. Buy a book at a shop and study it.

career.title: Career
career.noJob: You have no job yet. Visit a venue in the city and apply. Salaries are paid weekly on in-game Fridays.
career.paydayNote: Salaries are paid automatically each in-game Friday.

band.startIntro: Form a band, compose songs, rehearse them and play concerts to build fame.
band.noSongs: No songs yet. Compose your first one.
band.cannotPlay: You need at least one song and a venue in your city (and to be out of hospital) to play.
band.stageRolesHint: Your primary role counts 80% and secondary 20% toward concert performance.
band.recordHint: Pick tracks and a format. Sales, chart score and royalties accrue weekly.

charts.note: Charts rank active releases by recent momentum. Record a release to enter.

relationships.heirNote: When your character dies, you continue as your eldest living child (your heir).
relationships.noRelations: No relationships yet. Meet people around the city.

messages.noRecipients: No one to message yet. Meet people first.

estate.vipInfo: Learn skills faster and get a VIP badge.

politics.taxHint: Tax is applied to business profit in your city.
politics.noCandidates: No candidates yet. Be the first to run.
politics.youAreCandidate: You are running in this election.

press.interviewHint: Raises your star value and your band's fame. One interview per game week; Media Manipulation skill and a PR agent improve the outcome.
press.interviewCooldown: The press has heard enough for now — come back next week.
press.prAgentHint: Costs {fee} $ per game week. Places your interviews better and kills most gossip stories before they print.
press.fanClubHint: Founding costs {fee} $. Members grow every week with your fame and swell your concert audiences.
press.needBand: You need a band before fans can organise.
press.leaderOnly: Only the band leader can found the fan club.
press.emptyNews: No stories yet. Give an interview to make headlines.

awards.empty: No award show has been held yet. The first gala closes out the game year.
awards.achHint: Trophies are granted automatically as you play.

flash.none: Nothing new to show right now.
flash.walkedTo: What a stroll! You walked over to {name}.
flash.rested: You took a breather and feel rested.
flash.ate: That hit the spot. You had a proper meal.

guide.title: Welcome to the Fameworld Guide
guide.intro: Everything you need to find your footing in this world: pick a topic below. The guide grows together with the game.
guide.topic_start_sub: your first days, meters and money
guide.topic_music_sub: bands, songs, rehearsals, concerts and records
guide.topic_health_sub: mood, health, energy and the hospital

shop.title: Welcome to the Shop
shop.intro: Extras that support the game live here. Everything you need to play is earned in the world itself.
shop.vipPitch: VIP supports the world and unlocks a set of comforts for 30 real days.
shop.vipPerk1: Faster learning on all timed study.
shop.vipPerk2: A VIP badge next to your name.
shop.vipPerk3: More VIP perks arrive as the game grows.
shop.vipActive: Your VIP membership is active until {date}.
shop.creditsSoon: Credit products (treats, helpers and extra content) are on the way.
